Name: [Deployed] Resonaboo
Desc: Active Skill: Summons an Ether black hole that continuously pulls in enemies, dealing <color=#fe437e>Ether DMG</color> to enemies struck and accumulating <color=#fe437e>Ether Anomaly Buildup</color>.
Desc2: <color=#ffffff>Bangboo Chain Attack: Throws an Ether bomb at the target, dealing <color=#fe437e>Ether DMG</color> and accumulating massive <color=#fe437e>Ether Anomaly Buildup</color>.</color>
